post.summary: Login with username and password
Create the first user (signup wizard)

get.summary: Verify if the request is authenticated via Cookie and check onboarding status

post.summary: Logout the current user
Complete onboarding and configure authentication
Generate a new API key (only during onboarding or if not already exists)

get.summary: Check if any users exist in the system
Get all users
Retrieves the contents of a specified directory.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The full path to the directory to browse.

404.description: Directory not found at specified path

500.description: Internal server error occurred during operation

get.summary: Retrieves images related to a TV show based on the specified path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The API path for accessing the TV show images. This path is appended to the Sonarr API URL.

get.summary: Retrieves images related to a movie based on the specified path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The API path for accessing the movie images. This path is appended to the Radarr API URL.

get.summary: Retrieves all path mappings from the system.

200.description: Returns the list of path mappings.

post.summary: Updates or creates path mappings in the system.

requestBody.description: The list of path mappings to set.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of movies based on optional search criteria and sorting parameters.

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: An optional search query to filter movies by title or other attributes.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: An optional parameter specifying the field to sort by (e.g., "Title", "DateAdded").

parameters.name: ascending
parameters.description: A boolean indicating whether to sort in ascending order (default is true).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of movies to return per page (default is 20).

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The page number to retrieve (default is 1).

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of shows based on optional search criteria and sorting parameters.

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: An optional search query to filter shows by title or other attributes.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: An optional parameter specifying the field to sort by (e.g., "Title", "DateAdded").

parameters.name: ascending
parameters.description: A boolean indicating whether to sort in ascending order (default is true).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of shows to return per page (default is 20).

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The page number to retrieve (default is 1).

post.summary:
Sets the include status of a specified media item for translation.
When include is true, the item will be eligible for translation.
When include is false, the item will be excluded from translation.

requestBody.description: The request object containing the media type, id, and include status.

post.summary:
Sets the include status of all media items of a given type for translation.
For shows, this cascades to all seasons and episodes.

requestBody.description: The request object containing the media type and include status.

get.summary: Gets a summary of how many items of a given type are included for translation.

parameters.name: mediaType
parameters.description: The type of media (Movie or Show).

post.summary: Sets the amount of hours a media file needs to exist before translation is initiated.

requestBody.description: The request object containing the media type, id, and amount of hours to be set.

get.summary: Retrieves the default request templates for all AI providers.
Retrieves information about all jobs in the system.
Enqueues a background job to automate translation.
Enqueues a background job to retrieve movie data.
Enqueues a background job to retrieve show data.

delete.summary: Attempts to remove a background job from the queue or stop it if it's already running.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the job to be removed.

post.summary: Enqueues a background job to reindex shows and movies
Enqueues a background job to reindex shows and movies

get.summary: Retrieves the value of a specific setting by its key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the setting to retrieve.

post.summary: Retrieves the values of multiple settings by their keys.

requestBody.description: A list of keys for the settings to retrieve.

post.summary: Updates or creates a setting with the specified key and value.

requestBody.description: The setting object containing the key and value to be updated or created.

post.summary: Updates or creates multiple settings with the specified keys and values.

requestBody.description: A dictionary where the keys are setting keys and the values are the new values to assign.

post.summary: Encrypts and stores a single sensitive setting value.

requestBody.description: The setting object containing the key and plaintext value to encrypt and store.

post.summary:
Retrieves and decrypts sensitive settings values.
Returns an empty string for keys not found or that contain a non-decryptable value.

requestBody.description: A list of setting keys to retrieve and decrypt.

post.summary: Retrieves a list of subtitle files located at the specified path.

requestBody.description:
The directory path to search for subtitle files.This path is relative to the media folder
            and should not start with a forward slash.

post.summary: Initiates a translation job for the provided subtitle data.

requestBody.description:
The subtitle data to be translated. 
            This includes the subtitle path, subtitle source language and subtitle target language.

post.summary:
Initiates translation jobs for multiple media items.
Handles subtitle discovery and source language resolution server-side.

requestBody.description: The bulk translate request containing media IDs, target language, and media type.

post.summary: Translate a single subtitle line

requestBody.description:
The subtitle to be translated. 
            This includes the subtitle line, subtitle source language and subtitle target language.

post.summary: Translates subtitle content, supporting both single line and batch translation.

requestBody.description: The translation request containing one or more subtitle items

get.summary: Retrieves a list of available source languages and their supported target languages.
Retrieves available AI models for the currently active translation service.
Gets a single translation request with its event timeline

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the translation request

404.description: If the translation request was not found

get.summary:
Gets the collection of currently active (Pending or InProgress) translation
requests. Used by the frontend to seed its state on initial load; subsequent
updates are pushed over SignalR on the `ActiveTranslations` event.

200.description: Returns the collection of active translation requests

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of translation requests with optional filtering and sorting

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: Optional search term to filter requests

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Property name to sort the results by

parameters.name: ascending
parameters.description: Sort direction; true for ascending, false for descending

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve

200.description: Returns the paginated list of translation requests

500.description: If there was an error checking for updates

post.summary: Cancels an existing translation request

requestBody.description: The translation request to cancel

404.description: If the translation request was not found

500.description: If there was an error checking for updates

post.summary: Removes an existing translation request

requestBody.description: The translation request to remove

404.description: If the translation request was not found

500.description: If there was an error checking for updates

post.summary:
Retries an existing translation request
Does not delete the current one, just reques
The request with the same information

requestBody.description: The translation request to retry

404.description: If the translation request was not found

500.description: If there was an error checking for updates

post.summary:
Resumes a Failed, Cancelled or Interrupted translation request, reusing
any lines already translated by a previous attempt.

requestBody.description: The translation request to resume

200.description: Returns a message describing the resumed request

404.description: If the translation request was not found or is not in a resumable state

get.summary: Retrieves the current version information and checks for available updates.

500.description: If there was an error checking for updates

post.summary: Receives webhook events from Radarr

requestBody.description: The webhook payload from Radarr

post.summary: Receives webhook events from Sonarr

requestBody.description: The webhook payload from Sonarr

ActiveTranslation.description:
A Pending or InProgress translation request, broadcast to clients so rows
can resolve their state by matching on MediaId and MediaType

position.description: Position or index identifier of the subtitle

BatchSubtitleLine.description: Represents a subtitle item for translation

position.description: Position or index identifier matching the original subtitle

LabelValue.description: Represents a label-value pair for dropdown/select components in the UI
